div.head: Memorandum by the Secretary of State of a Conversation With the Polish Chargé (Sokolowski)
div.p: The Polish Chargé brought up the Fedoryszyn case. He told me he was glad to inform me that his government was ready to pay the indemnity in accordance with the proposal of the American State Department. He said though that they would probably want a release from any further claims by Fedoryszyn. I said I had been told of this request and I saw no objection to such a release.
